code:
import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(input)
  mut i = 0
  mut cur = ""
  mut has_pos = false
  mut max_val = 0
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(b)
      if is_ws(b)
        if not string.is_empty(cur)
          match string.parse_int(cur)
          when Some(v)
            if v > 0
              if not has_pos
                max_val = v
                has_pos = true
              else if v > max_val
                max_val = v
              end
            end
          when None
            ()
          end
          cur = ""
        end
      else
        cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not string.is_empty(cur)
    match string.parse_int(cur)
    when Some(v)
      if v > 0
        if not has_pos
          max_val = v
          has_pos = true
        else if v > max_val
          max_val = v
        end
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  if has_pos
    println("max=#{max_val}")
  else
    println("none")
  end
end
